title: 菊花賞の後に・新時代の予感

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I won?! I beat... McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No way... This isn't a joke, right? Is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her screams of joy echo throughout the track on
this crisp autumn day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Aren't you overstating your victory a
little, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I always knew this would be a possible
outcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The fact of the matter is that it was you who never believed in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's not true. I could never win before because
of how strong you are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And I don't think this is the end our competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've got that correct at least. No one would
claim as much after just one race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The next time we'll meet is... the
Arima Kinen, I think. If you decide to race in it,
that is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My, my, my... How very impatient. You've finally
managed to defeat me, so why not savor the
moment?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well then, enjoy yourself. Today's race was only
the beginning.
choice_data_list: The beginning of... the real battle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The beginning of the Golden Age of Mejiro, with
Ryan and I at the top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan completes her first battle against
Mejiro McQueen, earning herself a great
achievement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there's still a long road ahead of her—toward
the Arima Kinen, where many more strong
opponents await.
